sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitstrings (id INT, bstring BITSTRING);
UPDATE test_bitstrings SET bstring = bitstring('0010'::BITSTRING, 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bstring, bitstring(bstring, 12) AS extended_bstring FROM test_bitstrings;
DELETE FROM test_bitstrings WHERE bstring = bitstring('1101'::BITSTRING, 8);
